overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through Los Santos on a bright sunny day. The character travels from an enclosed sidewalk with white brick walls, passes through a commercial intersection featuring an In-N-Out Burger restaurant, and continues along a palm-lined street with parked sports cars.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with tall white brick wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a white brick wall, moving toward the city center

entered.detail: tall white painted brick wall running along the left side of the sidewalk
gray stone wall separating the sidewalk from the elevated road
ornate black metal street lamp with decorative base
palm trees visible in the distance against the city skyline

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow sidewalk enclosed by a tall white brick wall on the left and a stone retaining wall on the right. The scene is brightly lit with harsh midday shadows. Sparse traffic moves on the adjacent road while the camera maintains a steady third-person follow perspective.

events.description: character passes a group of pedestrians walking in the same direction along the narrow sidewalk

agents.ego_description: navigating past pedestrians while approaching a commercial intersection with visible fast-food signage

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in pink shirt walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large billboard featuring a dinosaur or creature advertisement
historic theater building with distinctive tower and dome
tall red and yellow In-N-Out Burger sign visible above buildings

segments.scene_description: The sidewalk opens slightly as the character approaches a commercial district. The white brick wall continues on the left while a prominent dinosaur billboard and the In-N-Out Burger sign become visible ahead. The character passes several pedestrians walking in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with fast food restaurant

events.description: character waits at the intersection corner as vehicles pass by
character steps off the curb and begins crossing the multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: waiting at the traffic light then crossing the street while avoiding passing vehicles including a green SUV

notable_agents.action: green SUV driving through the intersection

entered.detail: red and yellow In-N-Out Burger restaurant building with drive-thru
marked pedestrian crosswalk lines across the asphalt road
overhead traffic signal lights suspended over the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the intersection dominated by the In-N-Out Burger restaurant. After waiting for traffic including a green SUV, the character crosses the multi-lane road. The white brick wall recedes into the distance as the character moves through the wide intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined commercial street with parked cars

events.description: character reaches the opposite sidewalk and enters a more open area with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking along the wide sidewalk past parked sports cars and palm trees

entered.detail: row of tall palm trees lining the sidewalk
luxury sports cars parked along the curb including a silver coupe

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the character walks along a wider sidewalk lined with palm trees and parked luxury cars. The enclosed white brick wall and intersection are now behind, replaced by an open commercial street with green hills visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, enclosed urban corridor into a wide, sun-drenched commercial boulevard. It begins with the character walking along a sidewalk hemmed in by a tall white brick wall and a stone retaining wall under harsh midday light. As the path opens, the camera passes pedestrians and reveals a dinosaur billboard and an In-N-Out Burger sign emerging ahead. The scene then shifts as the character waits for a green SUV before crossing a multi-lane intersection, leaving the white brick wall behind. Finally, the environment expands into an open street lined with palm trees and parked luxury cars, with green hills appearing in the far distance.
